items: Created framer-motion utility library with product-appropriate variants
Added CountUp component with viewport intersection detection
Implemented subtle fade-up section reveals (0.28s duration)
Added staggered card animations with 0.06-0.08s delays
Implemented smooth page transitions (0.24s)
Added button press micro-interaction (scale 0.98)
Created admin sidebar nav item stagger animation
Increased section padding from py-6 to py-8/py-10
Enhanced card internal spacing from p-5 to p-6
Improved grid gaps from gap-4 to gap-5
Added more breathing room to hero sections (p-10 on lg)
Enhanced CTA section visual hierarchy with gradient background
Improved login page two-panel spacing (p-7/p-9)
Added transition-shadow for depth feedback
Improved focus-visible ring (ring-2 with offset)
Added active:scale-[0.98] press state
Enhanced primary button shadow on hover (shadow-md)
Improved outline variant border on hover
Increased lg button height to h-11 for better proportions
Added header fade-in animation (0.24s)
Implemented hero section delayed entrance (0.32s + 0.12s delay)
Added count-up animation to KPI metrics with viewport detection
Enhanced hero stat cards with staggered reveal
Improved CTA section with gradient background and badge
Added scroll-triggered section reveals for all major blocks
Enhanced button CTA with shadow feedback
Added two-panel staggered entrance (left -12px, right +12px)
Implemented count-up animation for stats with delays
Enhanced form card spacing and visual weight
Improved demo account cards motion reveal
Better vertical rhythm and breathing room
Added header motion animation
Implemented staggered card reveals (0.08s increments)
Maintained document readability focus
Added page-level fade-up entrance
Implemented summary card stagger with delays
Enhanced flagged resident cards with motion reveals
Improved card hover states with shadow and scale feedback
Increased spacing from gap-4/6 to gap-5/8 for clarity
Added page entrance animation
Implemented property card stagger (0.06s increments)
Enhanced hover states on property cards
Improved grid spacing for better scanning
Added page motion entrance
Improved tab spacing and visual hierarchy
Enhanced internal grid gaps for readability
Added sidebar slide-in animation (-12px)
Implemented nav item stagger (0.04s per item)
Enhanced active state visual feedback
Improved icon sizing (18px) and spacing
Added hover shadow for better affordance

motion_principles_applied.duration: 120-320ms for UI feedback, respecting product-first feel
motion_principles_applied.stagger: 60-80ms between related items for clarity without distraction
motion_principles_applied.viewport_detection: Animations trigger on scroll entry with once:true
motion_principles_applied.restraint: No heavy transforms, no jarring effects

visual_improvements.hierarchy: Stronger metric sizes, better label contrast
visual_improvements.shadows: Improved hover feedback with shadow elevation
visual_improvements.buttons: Added press states and better focus visibility
visual_improvements.cards: Enhanced hover states with subtle motion
visual_improvements.cta: Gradient background, larger text, better prominence

test_results.dashboard: PASS - page loads with stagger, auth works

notes: All motion is subtle and product-appropriate per requirements
No flashy animations - maintains operational feel
Spacing improvements create premium, breathable layouts
Count-up animations add engagement without distraction
Button feedback states improve interaction quality
All existing functionality preserved - zero breaking changes
Design guidelines followed precisely - teal primary, warm neutrals
